description: Verify c_variadic feature isolation: only in printf_c_variadic.rs

build_all.description: Check that our rust codebase is healthy

constraint_build_all.description: Ensure our rust codebase is healthy

fts5_no_libc_global.description: Ensure fts5.rs contains no libc:: calls (only external C FFI allowed)
goals: fts5.rs must not contain libc:: direct calls
All C interop must go through safe wrappers or external C FFI only

fts5_no_libc_calls.description: fts5.rs must not contain libc:: calls - use safe wrappers or external C FFI instead

libs_appendf.description: sqlite3_str_appendf C wrapper correctly exported in rlib and cdylib
goals: sqlite3_str_appendf (C FFI in c_code/printf_c.c) must be global symbol (T) in shell and rustfixture binaries
sqlite3_str_appendf must appear in dynamic symbol table (T) of libsqlite_noamalgam.so (cdylib)
sqlite3_str_appendf must NOT be a Rust variadic function — only in C

appendf_shell_rlib.description: sqlite3_str_appendf must be a global (T) symbol in the shell binary

appendf_tclsqlite_rlib.description: sqlite3_str_appendf must be a global (T) symbol in the rustfixture binary

appendf_cdylib_export.cmd: cd $PROJECT_ROOT && cargo build --release --lib 2>/dev/null && nm -D target/release/libsqlite_noamalgam.so | grep -q "T sqlite3_str_appendf$"
appendf_cdylib_export.description: sqlite3_str_appendf must appear in dynamic symbol table (T) of the cdylib

appendf_c_source.description: C implementation of sqlite3_str_appendf must exist in c_code/printf_c.c

appendf_not_in_rust_variadic.cmd: grep -q "void sqlite3_str_appendf" $PROJECT_ROOT/c_code/printf_c.c && ! grep -q "pub unsafe extern.*fn sqlite3_str_appendf" $PROJECT_ROOT/src/printf_c_variadic.rs
appendf_not_in_rust_variadic.description: sqlite3_str_appendf must NOT be a Rust variadic — it lives in c_code/printf_c.c

libs_snprintf.description: sqlite3_snprintf C wrapper correctly exported in rlib and cdylib
goals: sqlite3_snprintf (C FFI in c_code/snprintf.c) must be global symbol (T) in shell and rustfixture binaries
sqlite3_snprintf must appear in dynamic symbol table (T) of libsqlite_noamalgam.so (cdylib)
sqlite3_snprintf C wrapper must exist in its own file c_code/snprintf.c

snprintf_shell_rlib.description: sqlite3_snprintf must be a global (T) symbol in the shell binary

snprintf_tclsqlite_rlib.description: sqlite3_snprintf must be a global (T) symbol in the rustfixture binary

snprintf_cdylib_export.cmd: cd $PROJECT_ROOT && cargo build --release --lib 2>/dev/null && nm -D target/release/libsqlite_noamalgam.so | grep -q "T sqlite3_snprintf$"
snprintf_cdylib_export.description: sqlite3_snprintf must appear in dynamic symbol table (T) of the cdylib

snprintf_c_source.description: sqlite3_snprintf C wrapper must exist in c_code/snprintf.c

libs_vsnprintf.description: sqlite3_vsnprintf C wrapper correctly exported in rlib and cdylib
goals: sqlite3_vsnprintf (C FFI in c_code/vsnprintf.c) must be global symbol (T) in shell and rustfixture binaries
sqlite3_vsnprintf must appear in dynamic symbol table (T) of libsqlite_noamalgam.so (cdylib)
sqlite3_vsnprintf must NOT be defined as a Rust extern fn in printf.rs

vsnprintf_c_source.description: C implementation of sqlite3_vsnprintf must exist in c_code/vsnprintf.c

vsnprintf_cdylib_export.cmd: cd $PROJECT_ROOT && cargo build --release --lib 2>/dev/null && nm -D target/release/libsqlite_noamalgam.so | grep -q "T sqlite3_vsnprintf$" && test -f $PROJECT_ROOT/c_code/vsnprintf.c
vsnprintf_cdylib_export.description: sqlite3_vsnprintf must appear in dynamic symbol table (T) of the cdylib

vsnprintf_not_in_rust_printf.description: sqlite3_vsnprintf must NOT be defined as a Rust extern fn in printf.rs

vsnprintf_shell_rlib.description: sqlite3_vsnprintf must be a global (T) symbol in the shell binary

vsnprintf_tclsqlite_rlib.description: sqlite3_vsnprintf must be a global (T) symbol in the rustfixture binary
